hero.title: The Next Generation Cloud Platform
hero.subtitle: Harness the legendary power, security, and stability of FreeBSD for your cloud infrastructure.

about.title: What is {{projectName}}?
about.p1: CloudBSD is a comprehensive distribution built upon FreeBSD, designed to provide a robust environment for hosting assets like Jails, Virtual Machines (Bhyve), and both Linux and FreeBSD OCI containers.
about.p2: It focuses on seamless system discovery, automated worker node installation, and centralized management via a powerful Controller Service.

unifiedController.title: Unified Controller
unifiedController.desc: A central configuration point for your entire network. Manage Jails, VMs, and Containers from one place.

smartWorkerNodes.title: Smart Worker Nodes
smartWorkerNodes.desc: Orchestrated resource management with PXE boot support for effortless base OS deployment.

nativeVirtualization.title: Native Virtualization
nativeVirtualization.desc: Full Bhyve VMM integration for high-performance virtual hosts and hardware passthrough.

secureIsolation.title: Secure Isolation
secureIsolation.desc: FreeBSD-native Jails and Bhyve provide high-density, low-overhead isolation with strong security boundaries.

gpuManagement.title: GPU Management
gpuManagement.desc: Advanced hardware discovery and PCI passthrough support to share and manage GPU resources effectively.

zfsSecurity.title: ZFS-Native Security
zfsSecurity.desc: Industry-leading storage reliability with built-in data integrity, encryption support, and instant snapshotting.

hardenedServices.title: Hardened Services
hardenedServices.desc: Mandatory HTTPS with automated certificate management and automatic redirection of insecure ports.

rbac.title: Role-Based Access
rbac.desc: Centralized user management, SSH key distribution, and role-based authorization for granular control.

ociSupport.title: OCI Support
ociSupport.desc: Seamlessly run and manage both Linux and FreeBSD OCI containers on FreeBSD with built-in orchestration.

discovery.title: System Discovery
discovery.desc: Automated hardware reporting for RAM, CPU, Disks, and Network interfaces back to the controller.

apiFirst.title: API First
apiFirst.desc: Exposed management APIs for internal and external system integration and automation.

community.title: Join our Community
community.desc: Get help, share ideas, and contribute to the future of CloudBSD.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.stayTuned: We are still cooking. Stay tuned.

footer.builtOn: Built on FreeBSD · Released under 3-Clause BSD License
